opinion.h: KELEHER v. La SALLE COLLEGE, 361 U.S. 12 (1959)
KELEHER v. La SALLE COLLEGE. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 157. Decided October 12, 1959.
opinion.p: Samson B. Bernstein and Joseph E. Gembala, Jr. for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h: MISSOURI PACIFIC RAILROAD CO. v. DEERING, 361 U.S. 12 (1959)
opinion.p: 361 U.S. 12 MISSOURI PACIFIC RAILROAD CO. v. DEERING, REGISTER OF DEEDS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF KANSAS. No. 253. Decided October 12, 1959.
W. F. Lilleston, Henry V. Gott and Ralph M. Hope for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
